'''Mogoyu''' was a [[Rakririan]] who competed in the [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]]. The athlete barely came in second in the decaped-plus final, losing to [[Shimer Londalin]].

==Appearances==
